productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Solid Green Sweatshirt
description: CompositionGreen hooded sweatshirt with an inbuilt front of a T-shirt, made of 100% cotton, the inner shirt has a round neck with graphic and flock print on the front, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, full front zipper, pockets on the waist, ribbed hem and a hood with drawstringsFittingComfortWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakLine dry inside-out in shadeWarm iron only, but do not iron on printGet two for the price of one! Zipper this sweatshirt from status quo, or leave it open to flaunt the funky in-built T-shirt. Crafted from soft cotton fabric and long sleeves with ribbed hems, this sweatshirt is sure to keep you warm and cosy this winter. Layer it over jeans and slip into sneakers.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
